ukm:Metadata.dc:title: The Universal Credit Regulations 2013
ukm:Metadata.dc:subject: SOCIAL SECURITY
ukm:Metadata.dc:description: These Regulations contain provisions in relation to universal credit under Part 1 of the Welfare Reform Act 2012 (c.5) (“the Act”). They also include provision for a benefit cap under section 96 of the Act.

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Notes: This amendment not applied to legislation.gov.uk. The table of contents for this legislation will be dynamically updated when its provisions are revised
ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Universal Credit (Miscellaneous Amendments, Saving and Transitional Provision) Regulations 2018

ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Social Security (Income and Capital) (Miscellaneous Amendments) Regulations 2020

ukm:UnappliedEffect.Notes: This amendment not applied to legislation.gov.uk. The table of contents for this legislation will be dynamically updated when its provisions are revised
ukm:UnappliedEffect.ukm:AffectingTitle: The Social Security (Income and Capital) (Miscellaneous Amendments) Regulations 2020

Title.Emphasis: Particular needs or circumstances - capability for work

Text.Substitution: An award of universal credit is to include an amount in respect of the fact that a claimant has limited capability for work and work-related activity (“the LCWRA element”).

P2para.Text: The amount of that element is given in the table in regulation 36 by reference to whether the claimant is—
Whether a claimant has limited capability for ... work and work-related activity or is a severe conditions criteria claimant is determined in accordance with Part 5.

Text.Substitution: In the case of joint claimants, where each of them has limited capability for work and work-related activity,
the award is only to include one LCWRA element

Text.Addition: where the LCWRA element for each of them is a different amount, the LCWRA element to be included is the higher amount.

Para.Text: Reg. 27(3) excluded (29.4.2013) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2013 (S.I. 2013/386), regs. 1(2), 23(3)(a)(5)(a)
Reg. 27(3) excluded (29.4.2013) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2013 (S.I. 2013/386), regs. 1(2), 26(2)(a)(3)(a)
Reg. 27(3) excluded (29.4.2013) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2013 (S.I. 2013/386), regs. 1(2), 27(2)(a)(4)(a)
Reg. 27(3) excluded (16.6.2014) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2014 (S.I. 2014/1230), regs. 1(2), 23(3)

Words in reg. 27 heading substituted (3.4.2017) by The Employment and Support Allowance and Universal Credit (Miscellaneous Amendments and Transitional and Savings Provisions) Regulations 2017 (S.I. 2017/204), regs. 1, 4(4)(a) (with Sch. 2 paras. 8-15)
Reg. 27(3) excluded (16.6.2014) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2014 (S.I. 2014/1230), regs. 1(2), 24(2)

Reg. 27(3) excluded (cond.) by S.I. 2014/1230 reg. 23(1A) (as inserted (13.10.2014) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) (Amendment) Regulations 2014 (S.I. 2014/1626), regs. 1(2), 5(2)(c))
Reg. 27(3) excluded (16.6.2014) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2014 (S.I. 2014/1230), regs. 1(2), 24(4)
Reg. 27(3) excluded (16.6.2014) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2014 (S.I. 2014/1230), regs. 1(2), 21(2)
Reg. 27(3) excluded (16.6.2014) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2014 (S.I. 2014/1230), regs. 1(2), 21(4)

Words in reg. 27(2) substituted (3.4.2017) by The Employment and Support Allowance and Universal Credit (Miscellaneous Amendments and Transitional and Savings Provisions) Regulations 2017 (S.I. 2017/204), regs. 1, 4(4)(c) (with Sch. 2 paras. 8-15)

Reg. 27(4) substituted (3.4.2017) by The Employment and Support Allowance and Universal Credit (Miscellaneous Amendments and Transitional and Savings Provisions) Regulations 2017 (S.I. 2017/204), regs. 1, 4(4)(e) (with Sch. 2 paras. 8-15)

Words in reg. 27(3) omitted (3.4.2017) by virtue of The Employment and Support Allowance and Universal Credit (Miscellaneous Amendments and Transitional and Savings Provisions) Regulations 2017 (S.I. 2017/204), regs. 1, 4(4)(d) (with Sch. 2 paras. 8-15)

Reg. 27(1) substituted (3.4.2017) by The Employment and Support Allowance and Universal Credit (Miscellaneous Amendments and Transitional and Savings Provisions) Regulations 2017 (S.I. 2017/204), regs. 1, 4(4)(b) (with Sch. 2 paras. 8-15)
Reg. 27(3) excluded (16.6.2014) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2014 (S.I. 2014/1230), regs. 1(2), 26(2)(a)
Reg. 27(3) excluded (16.6.2014) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2014 (S.I. 2014/1230), regs. 1(2), 26(3)(a)
Reg. 27(3) excluded (16.6.2014) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2014 (S.I. 2014/1230), regs. 1(2), 19(2)(a)
Reg. 27(3) excluded (16.6.2014) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2014 (S.I. 2014/1230), regs. 1(2), 19(4)(a)
Reg. 27(3) excluded (16.6.2014) by The Universal Credit (Transitional Provisions) Regulations 2014 (S.I. 2014/1230), regs. 1(2), 23(2)
Words in reg. 27(3) inserted (6.4.2026 with effect in relation to assessment periods commencing on or after that date) by Universal Credit Act 2025 (c. 22), s. 2(3), Sch. 1 para. 3(b)
Reg. 27(2)(a)-(d) and words inserted (6.4.2026 with effect in relation to assessment periods commencing on or after that date) by Universal Credit Act 2025 (c. 22), s. 2(3), Sch. 1 para. 3(a)

Words in reg. 27(4)(a) in reg. 27(4) renumbered as reg. 27(4)(a) (6.4.2026 with effect in relation to assessment periods commencing on or after that date) by Universal Credit Act 2025 (c. 22), s. 2(3), Sch. 1 para. 3(c)(i)
Reg. 27(4)(b) and word inserted (6.4.2026 with effect in relation to assessment periods commencing on or after that date) by Universal Credit Act 2025 (c. 22), s. 2(3), Sch. 1 para. 3(c)(ii)
